creator: devin.teske@fisglobal.com
text:
I'm working on a new engine for bsdinstall. I got to a stable state on the =
new/shiny back-end today and (like sysinstall -- the basis for the new engi=
ne) it remembers user input _and_ only re-performs failed steps.

I started work on the new engine in November and expect to demonstrate it l=
ive in-action at BSDCan 2013 (May next year).

At that time, this PR should be re-evaluated.
--=20
Devin
